events.fact: The player begins Day 6 with the objective of completing the primary residence (Othala).
Construction begins on the 26-degree roof and floorboards for Othala.
A chimney with a roof bridge is constructed to allow ventilation for the indoor fire.
The Chopping Block is built, upgrading the workbench to level 2 and unlocking new recipes.
The Norns’ Trial (Raid) occurs as Eikthyr rallies forest creatures to attack the base.
The player survives the raid with health dropping to 12 hit points.
The player crafts a Leather Helmet, marking an upgrade in armor.
The first beehive for The Golden Ones is constructed to begin honey production.
A wild beehive is discovered within an abandoned structure (Echoes of the Past).
The player marks the location of Othala on the world map.
A second beehive is constructed near the main base.
A second wild beehive is located in another abandoned structure.
A major resource patch of mushrooms and raspberries is discovered and marked on the map.
